voice_settings.voice_description: Warm, clear, professional female voice — calm and knowledgeable

system_prompt: [FULL SYSTEM PROMPT FROM SECTION 1 — INSERT VERBATIM HERE]
begin_message: Thank you for calling Indoor Environmental Testing. This is Jordan — how can I help you today?

general_tools.name: end_call
general_tools.description: End the call after confirming all information has been collected and next steps communicated.

function_calls.name: submit_inquiry_intake
function_calls.description: Submit a completed new client inquiry form to the backend CRM or AppTotal queue. Call this ONLY after all required fields have been collected and confirmed with the caller.

callback_phone.description: Best callback phone number including area code

property_address.description: Full street address of the property to be inspected

state.description: State of the property (WI, TN, IL, etc.)

in_service_area.description: Whether the property address falls within the confirmed service area

square_footage.description: Approximate square footage of the property, if provided

concern_description.description: Caller's description of the issue, symptoms, or reason for testing

health_symptoms_reported.description: Whether the caller reported any health symptoms potentially related to the environment

prior_testing_or_remediation.description: Whether prior testing or remediation has occurred at the property

real_estate_transaction.description: Whether a real estate transaction is involved

transaction_deadline.description: If real estate transaction, the closing or deadline date if provided

preferred_timeframe.description: Caller's preferred days or times for an inspection

urgency_flag.description: Urgency level based on call content — routine for standard inquiries, elevated for health symptoms or tight timelines, urgent for acute health events or 48-hour deadlines

referral_source.description: How the caller heard about Indoor Environmental Testing

call_notes.description: Any additional context from the conversation not captured in other fields

after_hours.description: Whether this call was received outside of normal business hours

function_calls.name: check_service_area
function_calls.description: Verify whether a given city and state falls within Indoor Environmental Testing's service area before committing to a service call.

zip_code.description: ZIP code if available, for more precise area check

function_calls.name: flag_urgent_callback
function_calls.description: Flag a call for urgent human callback — use when caller has acute health symptoms, a critical deadline, is highly distressed, or specifically requests to speak with a human or Martine.

brief_description.description: Short description of the situation for the human reviewer

function_calls.name: log_post_inspection_query
function_calls.description: Log a post-inspection callback with report questions for specialist follow-up.

inspection_date_approx.description: Approximate date of inspection if caller knows it

question_summary.description: Summary of the caller's questions about their report

requires_specialist.description: Whether the question requires a specialist rather than general knowledge

custom_analysis_data.name: call_outcome
custom_analysis_data.description: What was the result of the call?

custom_analysis_data.name: service_type_interest
custom_analysis_data.description: What type of service was the caller interested in?

custom_analysis_data.name: caller_satisfaction_estimate
custom_analysis_data.description: Estimated caller satisfaction based on tone and outcome

custom_analysis_data.name: intake_complete
custom_analysis_data.description: Was all required intake information collected?
